name: Yoda
hint: Backwards, he speaks. Wise, he is.
oneLiner: 900 years old and still debugging, he is.
verbs: Strong with this one, the code is
Much to learn, you still have
Judge me by my lines of code, do you

name: The Joker
oneLiner: Some men just want to watch the build fail.
verbs: Wanna know how I got these bugs
Let's put a smile on that code
Nobody panics when things go according to plan
All it takes is one bad commit

name: Forrest Gump
hint: Life is like a box of chocolates
oneLiner: He may not be a smart man, but he knows what good code is.
verbs: Life is like a box of chocolates
That's all I have to say about that

name: Vito Corleone
oneLiner: He made your spinner an offer it couldn't refuse.
verbs: Making an offer you can't refuse
Leaving the gun, taking the cannoli
On the day of my daughter's wedding
It's not personal, it's strictly business

name: Darth Vader
oneLiner: He found your lack of tests disturbing.
verbs: Finding the lack of tests disturbing

name: Sherlock Holmes
oneLiner: He deduced your spinner's identity before you even asked.
verbs: Solving it before reading the question

name: Ron Burgundy
oneLiner: He's kind of a big deal in the spinner community.
verbs: I'm kind of a big deal
60% of the time, it works every time
I'm in a glass case of emotion
Don't act like you're not impressed

name: The Dude
oneLiner: The spinner abides, man.
verbs: That's just, like, your opinion, man
This aggression will not stand, man
Taking it easy for all us sinners
That rug really tied the room together
New information has come to light

name: Jack Sparrow
oneLiner: You may have noticed the spinner was a bit... unsteady.
verbs: But you have heard of me
The code is more like guidelines
This is the day you almost caught me

name: Gandalf
from: The Lord of the Rings — J.R.R. Tolkien
oneLiner: A spinner is never late, nor is it early.
verbs: You shall not pass... this bug
Keeping it secret, keeping it safe

name: Hannibal Lecter
hint: I do wish we could chat longer
oneLiner: He paired your spinner with a nice Chianti.
verbs: Having an old friend for dinner
With fava beans and a nice Chianti
A census taker once tried to test me
I do wish we could chat longer

name: Tyler Durden
hint: You do not talk about it
oneLiner: The first rule of this spinner is you don't talk about this spinner.
verbs: First rule: we don't talk about it
It's only after we've lost everything
I am Jack's complete lack of surprise
The things you own end up owning you
You met me at a very strange time

name: The Terminator
hint: He said he'd be back. He meant it.
oneLiner: He'll be back. Next session.
verbs: Come with me if you want results
I need your clothes, boots, and code

name: Jules Winnfield
hint: The path of the righteous man
oneLiner: He just quoted Ezekiel at your progress bar.
verbs: The path of the righteous man
I'm trying real hard to be the shepherd

name: Michael Scott
oneLiner: He declared himself World's Best Spinner.
verbs: I am the world's best boss
I'm not superstitious, just a little stitious
Would I rather be feared or loved? Both
You miss 100% of the shots you don't take
I knew exactly what to do, but in a much more real sense I had no idea

name: Homer Simpson
oneLiner: Mmm... spinner.
verbs: Trying is the first step toward failure
In this house we obey the laws of thermodynamics

name: Tony Stark
oneLiner: He built this spinner in a cave. With a box of scraps.
verbs: I am inevitable — wait, wrong guy
Proof that I have a heart

name: Ferris Bueller
oneLiner: He took the day off from being a normal spinner.
verbs: If you don't stop and look around once in a while
You can never go too far
How can I possibly be expected to handle work
The question isn't what am I going to do

name: James Bond
oneLiner: The name is Spinner. Mystery Spinner.
verbs: The name is Code. Claude Code

name: Bugs Bunny
oneLiner: He took a wrong turn at your progress bar.
verbs: Taking a wrong turn at Albuquerque
Of course you realize, this means war

name: Tyrion Lannister
hint: I drink and I know things
oneLiner: He drank and he spun things.
verbs: I drink and I know things
A Lannister always pays his debts
Let me give you some advice
A mind needs books like a sword needs a whetstone
I have a tender spot for cripples and broken things

name: Tony Soprano
oneLiner: He had a panic attack about your loading times.
verbs: A boss has to be like a leader

name: Obi-Wan Kenobi
oneLiner: Hello there. General Spinner.
verbs: These aren't the bugs you're looking for
Feeling a disturbance in the Force
From a certain point of view
May the Force be with you

name: Dorothy
oneLiner: Clicking her heels won't make your code compile faster.
verbs: Lions and tigers and bears, oh my
Pay no attention to the man behind the curtain

name: Ricky Bobby
hint: If you ain't first, you're last
oneLiner: If your spinner ain't first, it's last.
verbs: If you ain't first, you're last
I'm not sure what to do with my hands

name: Ron Swanson
hint: Give me all the bacon and eggs you have
oneLiner: He knows more than your spinner. That's all.
verbs: Give me all the bacon and eggs you have
Crying is only acceptable at funerals and the Grand Canyon
Clear alcohols are for rich women on diets
Any dog under 50 pounds is a cat
I once worked with a guy for three years and never knew his name

name: Dwight Schrute
oneLiner: Assistant TO the mystery spinner.
verbs: Identity theft is not a joke
I am faster than 80% of all snakes

name: Walter White
oneLiner: He is the one who spins.
verbs: I am the one who knocks

name: Thanos
hint: Perfectly balanced, as all things should be
oneLiner: Perfectly balanced spinner, as all things should be.
verbs: Perfectly balanced, as all things should be
A small price to pay for salvation
The hardest choices require the strongest wills
I used the stones to destroy the stones

name: Napoleon Dynamite
oneLiner: This spinner has great nunchuck skills.
verbs: This is pretty much the worst day ever
Do the chickens have large talons

name: Shrek
hint: What are you doing in my swamp?
oneLiner: What was he doing in your progress bar?
verbs: What are you doing in my codebase
This is the part where you run

name: SpongeBob SquarePants
hint: Who lives in a pineapple under the sea?
oneLiner: He's ready. He's been ready. He was always ready.
verbs: I don't need it... I NEED IT
The inner machinations of my mind

name: Inigo Montoya
hint: You killed my father. Prepare to die.
oneLiner: You killed his progress bar. Prepare to wait.
verbs: Hello. My name is Inigo Montoya
You killed my father. Prepare to die
I do not think it means what you think it means
I have been in the revenge business so long
You seem a decent fellow. I hate to kill you

name: Hamlet
hint: To be or not to be
oneLiner: To spin or not to spin -- there was never really a question.
verbs: To code or not to code
Something is rotten in the state of this code
Though this be madness, yet there is method in it
Brevity is the soul of wit
To be or not to be
The lady doth protest too much

name: Tony Montana
hint: Say hello to my little friend
oneLiner: Say hello to his little spinner.
verbs: Say hello to my little friend
I always tell the truth, even when I lie
All I have in this world is my word and my code
Making way for the bad guy
Every day above ground is a good day

name: Ace Ventura
oneLiner: Alrighty then. Case closed.
verbs: I'm ready to go in, Coach

name: Borat
oneLiner: Very nice! Great success with the spinning!
verbs: What kind of dog is this

name: Batman
hint: He is vengeance. He is the night.
oneLiner: He disappeared mid-spin. Classic.
